title: Nexusfile
description: Intent-first app declaration for Nexus. Declares services, domains, resources, and local development workflow. Infrastructure implementation details (Ingress class, TLS issuer, etc.) are intentionally excluded.

$schema.description: Optional schema reference for IDE validation.

name.description: App identifier used by Nexus orchestration.

build.description: Workspace base-layer intent: runtime hint and one-time setup commands.

image.description: Base image reference or well-known shorthand (e.g. 'node', 'go', 'python'). Used for VM channel selection and deploy base image defaults.

setup.description: One-time commands run during workspace base-layer bake. Changing this invalidates the base image cache.

dev.description: Local development lifecycle metadata. Consumed by UI actions or workspace flags, not a CLI subcommand.

up.description: Local dev start command. Opaque string — can call npm, make, docker compose, etc.

port.description: Primary local port for auto-forwarding and health checks.

services.description: Runtime service topology. Each service becomes a Deployment + Service at deploy time.

source.description: Service working directory relative to project root. Default: project root.

start.description: Deploy runtime command. Auto-detected from Procfile or package.json if omitted. If dockerfile is set, Dockerfile CMD is used for deploy and start is optional.

port.description: Listening port. Required if targeted by a domain.

dockerfile.description: Path to Dockerfile for deploy build. Mutually exclusive with 'image' on the same service.

image.description: Container base image for deploy. Mutually exclusive with 'dockerfile' on the same service.

domains.description: Domain routing intent. Maps to Ingress or Gateway HTTPRoute at deploy time.

service.description: Target service name. Must reference a declared service.

type.description: Resource type. 'postgres' is the only supported type in v1.

bind.description: Services that receive the resource connection.

as.description: Env var name for the connection string (e.g. DATABASE_URL).

release.description: Release-phase command executed before traffic cutover.

command.description: One-off pre-traffic command (e.g. database migration). Equivalent to Helm pre-upgrade hook.

vm.description: VM configuration for local workspace development.

image.description: Reserved for future prebuilt image/channel resolution.

cpus.description: Number of virtual CPUs for the bundle VM. Default: 2.

mem.description: VM memory size in MiB. Default: 2048.
